name: Flower Cardian Willow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花札衛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カーディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>柳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やなぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: While you control a Level 10 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Flower Cardian" monster in your GY; shuffle it into your Deck, then draw 1 card.
mnst_eff: While you control a Level 10 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Flower Cardian" monster in your GY; shuffle it into your Deck, then draw 1 card.
eff: While you control a Level 10 or lower "Flower Cardian" monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Normal or Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except "Flower Cardian" monsters. Once per turn: You can target 1 "Flower Cardian" monster in your GY; shuffle it into your Deck, then draw 1 card.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Normal Summons to archetype specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
